details.source_1_backend_diagnostic_aggregation: complete_session creates 4 SkillAssessment rows per session. With multiple diagnostic sessions, rows accumulate.
details.source_2_learning_contract_creation: create_contract queries ALL SkillAssessment rows across ALL sessions without deduplication. No limit to latest session.
details.source_3_frontend_rendering: Renders whatever assessments are in the snapshot. Uses array index as React key (unstable).
details.source_4_no_idempotency: POST /learning-contract/current always creates a new contract. Unique constraint (user_id, version) causes error on retry.

backend_create_contract_deduplication.change: Added _deduplicate_assessments() function that keeps only the latest assessment per skill_name. Extracted from create_contract for testability.
backend_create_contract_deduplication.effect: diagnostic_profile_snapshot now contains exactly 4 unique skill entries regardless of how many diagnostic sessions exist.

backend_idempotency_check.change: Added existing active contract check at start of create_contract. Returns existing contract instead of creating duplicate.
backend_idempotency_check.effect: POST /learning-contract/current is now idempotent. Repeated calls return the same contract.

frontend_stable_react_key.change: Changed React key from array index (key={i}) to skill name (key={a.skill}).
frontend_stable_react_key.effect: Stable rendering, no React key warnings.

frontend_client_side_dedup.change: Added client-side deduplication safety net that filters rawAssessments to keep first occurrence per skill.
frontend_client_side_dedup.effect: Even if backend returns duplicates, frontend won't render them.

final_state.next_allowed_action: Accept 006B deduplication fix, then proceed with MULTIDIMENSIONAL_DIAGNOSTIC_RECOVERY
